body:
No API design issues found. The public API surface in `review/arm-monitorslis-node.api.md` is clean for this first `1.0.0-beta.1` release of `@azure/arm-monitorslis`.

- Package version `1.0.0-beta.1` is consistently aligned across `package.json`, `src/api/monitorContext.ts` (`azsdk-js-arm-monitorslis/1.0.0-beta.1`), and `CHANGELOG.md`.
- The first `CHANGELOG.md` entry contains expected hard-coded content; no alpha-version comparison issues.
- `KnownVersions` correctly contains only `2025-03-01-preview` (new preview package — appropriate).
- No `_N`, `AutoGenerated`, or `_`-prefix naming issues detected.
- No type-safety violations (`unknown` appears only in `ErrorAdditionalInfo.info`, which is acceptable per guidelines).
- No breaking changes (new package, first release).
- All public symbols are properly re-exported in the API report.

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- ✅ **ADO CI Pipeline**: All checks passed. Latest build [6209519](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/public/_build/results?buildId=6209519) completed successfully on 2026-04-25 against the current HEAD commit.
- ❌ **Required reviewer approvals**: Awaiting approvals from the requested reviewers (`@MaryGao`, `@qiaozha`, `@JialinHuang803`).
